name: Spianata (Tomato-dappled Pizza Blanca)
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm olive oil over low heat in a sauté pan.
2. Add garlic and after about one minute, add the tomatoes. Cook over medium heat for 5 to 6 minutes.
3. Allow to cool.
4. On a lightly floured board, roll out each pizza ball to form a 12-inch by 1/8-inch circle.
5. Place each on an oiled baking sheet or pizza pan.
6. Dimple the dough and brush the tops with the tomato mixture.
7. Preheat oven to 425°F.
8. Bake until the crusts are crisp, about 20 to 25 minutes.
